message:
perf: add SIMD dispatch, zero-copy frame pool, and signal cleanup

- Add SIMD dispatch for pattern matching (NEON/AVX2/SSE2)
- Add zero-copy frame pool with reference counting (5 slots)
- Fix race condition: slots now skip overwrite when in use
- Add signal handlers for SIGINT/SIGTERM to restore terminal
- Add mouseMove for hover effects with throttling
- Add better logging for tab bar click debugging
